title: DOL requests comment on proposed revisions to Migrant and Seasonal Farmworker (MSFW) Monitoring Report and Complaint/Apparent Violation Form
description_html: DOL seeks comments on proposed revisions to an information collection titled, Migrant and Seasonal Farmworker (MSFW) Monitoring Report and Complaint/Apparent Violation Form. Form ETA–5148, Services to Migrant and Seasonal Farmworkers Report, collects data that monitors and measures how a State Workforce Agency delivers services to MSFWs. Form ETA–8429, One-Stop Career Center Compliance Referral Record, collects and documents complaints, including trafficking and sexual harassment/coercion/assault complaints. [ID #949]
